meaning: n.干舷,最上面,最上层adv.在甲板上,在首席adj.水线以上部分的
examples: He left the control station and went topside.
The rest of you, topside with me.
An ingenious system of lines ran underneath the decks, to avoid entangling anybody topside.
The pace of this rally suggests that investors are not well positioned for further topside gains.
